---
title: "Using AdaBoost to Predict Whether Kobe Bryant's Shot is a Hit"
description: "A integrated model project"
author:
  - name: "Longxiang Wu"
date: 2024-06-01
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
preview: kobe.png
---

```{r setup, echo=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
knitr::include_url("kebitoulanmingzhongyuce.html", height="2000px")
```
